ATDE.settings.debug.name: Enable Debug Logging
ATDE.settings.debug.hint: Log verbose diagnostics (and Token Magic FX call traces) to the browser console. Per-user; leave off for normal play.
ATDE.settings.hpPreset.name: HP System Preset
ATDE.settings.hpPreset.hint: Choose a preset HP path for a supported game system, or use Custom.
ATDE.settings.customHpCurrentPath.name: Custom HP Current Path
ATDE.settings.customHpMaxPath.name: Custom HP Max Path
ATDE.settings.customCreatureTypePath.hin: Data path for creature type on the Custom HP preset. Returns a string or array. Example: system.details.type.value
ATDE.settings.enableSaturation.name: Enable HP Desaturation
ATDE.settings.enableSaturation.hint: Desaturate tokens as HP decreases. Uses Token Magic FX when available, otherwise a built-in colour filter.
ATDE.settings.enableDamageTint.name: Enable Creature Type Blood Color Tint
ATDE.settings.enableDamageTint.hint: Continuously tints the token image toward its blood color as HP decreases, similar to BG3 combat portraits.
ATDE.settings.grayscaleOnDeath.name: Grayscale Only on Death (No Tint)
ATDE.settings.grayscaleOnDeath.hint: When enabled, tokens at 0 HP revert to pure grayscale instead of retaining the blood color tint.
ATDE.settings.useSteppedSaturation.name: Use 10% Desaturation Steps
ATDE.settings.useSteppedSaturation.hint: Use 0.1 saturation steps per 10% HP instead of a smooth gradient.
ATDE.settings.deadOpacity.name: Dead Token Opacity
ATDE.settings.deadOpacity.hint: Opacity for tokens at 0 HP. 0 makes them fully invisible.
ATDE.settings.flashOnDamage.name: Flash on Damage
ATDE.settings.flashOnDamage.hint: Briefly pulse a red tint over a token when it loses HP.
ATDE.settings.flashOnHeal.name: Flash on Heal
ATDE.settings.flashOnHeal.hint: Briefly pulse a green tint over a token when it gains HP.
ATDE.settings.enableDamageSplatter.name: Enable Damage Splatter
ATDE.settings.enableDamageSplatter.hint: Spray blood splatter on the ground around a token when it takes damage. The amount scales with the damage dealt (as a share of max HP). Respects the Persist Blood Between Reloads setting.
ATDE.settings.enableBleedingOverlay.name: Enable Bleeding Overlay
ATDE.settings.enableBleedingOverlay.hint: Show animated edge drips at or below the bleeding threshold.
ATDE.settings.bleedingThreshold.name: Bleeding Threshold (%)
ATDE.settings.bleedingThreshold.hint: Tokens at or below this HP percentage gain a blood overlay.
ATDE.settings.bleedingDropCount.name: Bleeding Drop Count
ATDE.settings.bleedingDropCount.hint: Number of animated drips around the token edge.
ATDE.settings.enableBloodTrails.name: Enable Blood Trails
ATDE.settings.enableBloodTrails.hint: Leave a sparse blood mark near the token's origin each time it moves while bloodied.
ATDE.settings.enableBloodPathTrails.name: Enable Blood Path Trails
ATDE.settings.enableBloodPathTrails.hint: Leave drips and smears along the token's full movement path through each grid square it crosses.
ATDE.settings.bloodTrailSpacing.name: Blood Trail Spacing (pixels)
ATDE.settings.bloodTrailSpacing.hint: Minimum distance a bloodied token must move before another blood mark is dropped.
ATDE.settings.bloodTrailLifetime.name: Blood Trail Lifetime
ATDE.settings.bloodTrailLifetime.hint: How long blood trail marks remain before fading (30s – 30min in 30s steps). Slide all the way right for infinite — marks never fade.
ATDE.settings.enableBloodPool.name: Enable Death Blood Pool
ATDE.settings.enableBloodPool.hint: Create a blood pool under a token when it reaches 0 HP.
ATDE.settings.deathTrigger.name: Death Pool Trigger
ATDE.settings.deathTrigger.hint: When to spill the death blood pool. At 0 HP: any token that hits 0. NPCs only: skip player-owned characters (e.g. downed PCs). Requires Dead/Defeated status: only once the token is marked dead/defeated.
ATDE.settings.bloodPoolLifetime.name: Blood Pool Lifetime
ATDE.settings.bloodPoolLifetime.hint: How long the death pool remains before fading (30s – 30min in 30s steps). Slide all the way right for infinite — pools never fade.
ATDE.settings.persistDecals.name: Persist Blood Between Reloads
ATDE.settings.persistDecals.hint: Save blood trails and death pools to the scene so they survive a reload and appear for players who load in later. Disable to keep blood session-only.
ATDE.bloodColors.buttonHint: Customize the global default blood color and per-type colors (undead, construct, elementals, and custom types).
ATDE.notify.noTmfx: Scorpious187's Agnostic Token Damage Effects: Token Magic FX is not active — using the built-in colour fallback. Install Token Magic FX for higher-quality desaturation.
ATDE.notify.clearedBlood: Cleared persisted blood on the current scene.
ATDE.tokenConfig.disableHint: Skip all blood and coloration effects for this token.
ATDE.tokenConfig.colorHint: Force this token's blood color, ignoring creature-type and global settings.
ATDE.dialog.title: Blood Colors by Creature Type
ATDE.dialog.intro: Configure the global default blood color, per-type colors, death styles, and custom creature type rules. Custom types are matched before built-in types.
ATDE.dialog.suppressed: Blood effects suppressed — desaturation still applies.
ATDE.dialog.customHint: Match against any actor data path. Data path is a dot-notation property (e.g. system.traits.value). Match values is a comma-separated list — any substring match triggers the type.
ATDE.dialog.clearBloodTitle: Remove all saved blood on the current scene
